build.details: Build and lint pass with 0 errors. 8 pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in Accordion, Archive (x2), ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero (x2), Tabs — none in Header files.

tsxPhpSync.details: All 5 structural changes are identical between HeaderMain.tsx and HeaderMain.php. Automated sync tool passes (0 errors). Class strings match verbatim for: nav-bar-inner wrapper, logo anchor (both placeholder and set states in TSX vs single anchor in PHP), right column div, nav element, mobile toggle button. No $attributes extraction anti-pattern. @var docblock present. PHP functions verified.

structureWarning.message: TSX 0 vs PHP 3 elements at depth 1 — pre-existing expected difference. TSX uses InnerBlocks/Gutenberg editor components at depth 1; PHP renders DOM elements directly. Not a defect.

testPageIntegrity.details: All 9 header instances render without error. Link counts match previous QA run exactly — no regressions in link structure.

logoSpansBothRows.details: Desktop screenshot at 1440px confirms the IGNITE logo (bee icon + wordmark) visually spans the full height of the header bar — covering both the utility row and the nav row — on all 9 variations. self-stretch on the logo anchor combined with items-stretch on the nav-bar-inner container achieves the intended two-row span. text-white confirmed present, logo renders white on charcoal background.
logoSpansBothRows.auditEvidence: a.self-stretch.text-white present on all 9 rendered instances

mobileBehavior.details: Mobile screenshot at 375px confirms: hamburger toggle visible on all 9 instances. button[aria-label='Toggle Main Menu'] confirmed present on all 9 via page audit. Nav collapsible menu present (header-collapsable with max-h-0 collapsed state). Mobile CTA section present in instance 0 (Full Content variation). Logo constrained to max-h-[26px] on mobile. Mobile SEP button (above nav bar) present on applicable instances.

desktopBehavior.details: Desktop structure confirmed: utility row (search + SEP link) present inside right column (hidden md:flex). Nav items rendered as horizontal menubar inside right column below utility row, separated by md:gap-6. Scroll behavior data attributes correct across all 9 variations: instance 0-2 fixed+hide combos, instance 4 not-fixed, instances 5-8 fixed-only. Submenu alignment right verified on instance 5 (Right Menu item). Many-nav-items instance (6) renders all 8 items.

accessibility.details: ARIA attributes confirmed on all 9 instances: role='menubar' present on all 9 (via [role=menubar] selector). button[aria-label='Toggle Main Menu'] with aria-controls and aria-expanded='false' present on all 9. nav[aria-label] confirmed via nav_in_right_col selector finding the header-collapsable nav. tabindex='-1' on nav. Focus-visible classes present on logo anchor, mobile toggle, and search buttons.

regressions.details: Link counts per instance [16,3,4,4,3,4,9,4,3] identical to prior QA run — no links lost or duplicated. Data attribute values match expected per variation. All 5 structural selectors (logo_self_stretch, nav_in_right_col, mobile_toggle, nav_bar_inner_stretch, menubar) found true on all 9 instances. No new issues introduced.

passedChecks: Build passes with 0 errors, 0 Header-specific warnings

items-stretch on nav-bar-inner rendered on all 9 instances
self-stretch + text-white on logo anchor rendered on all 9 instances
Nav inside right column (flex-col md:gap-6) confirmed on all 9 instances
md:mt-6 removed from nav in both files; parent gap-6 handles spacing
Mobile toggle at nav-bar-inner level on all 9 instances
Desktop: IGNITE logo visually spans both rows (utility + nav) at 1440px
Mobile: hamburger toggle visible, collapsible menu present at 375px
ARIA: role=menubar, aria-label, aria-expanded, aria-controls all present on all 9 instances
